entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange represented by the coingi.com trading domain and historical spot-market listings.
entity.notes: Current exchange-directory data preserves the Coingi identity and official domain but reports untracked volume and no reserve or market data. The first-party trading interface could not be independently verified during this review, so HEI uses limited rather than active or dead. Launch date and national origin remain unset or broad rather than guessed.

evidence.title: Coingi official exchange domain
evidence.notes: Dedicated first-party domain is preserved by the current exchange profile, but the trading interface was not independently verified in this review.

evidence.title: Coingi exchange profile
evidence.notes: Current profile preserves the centralized exchange identity and official domain while reporting untracked volume, unavailable reserve data, and no current market data.
